/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/gnc_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/sensors/imu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/sensors/gps.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/sensors/barometer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/estimation/ekf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/estimation/state_estimator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/guidance/guidance_law.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/guidance/trajectory_planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/control/pid_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/control/actuator_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/control/rate_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/flight_loop/flight_loop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/utils/math_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/utils/data_logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gnc_app.dir/src/utils/config_loader.cpp.o -o gnc_app  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.7.0
